raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "The statement is a declaration of personal boundary-setting and self-protection. It communicates an intention to cease acting as an emotional caretaker for others and to maintain one's own energetic integrity.",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "The speaker has been acting as an emotional surrogate (absorbing or stabilizing others' chaos).",
    "It is possible to consciously 'release' a role or pattern of behavior.",
    "Emotional states or 'frequency' can be physically or energetically handed back or returned.",
    "One's personal field or energetic boundary can be kept whole and distinct from others' disturbances.",
    "The speaker has the agency and ability to control this process."
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "The statement is internally coherent as a self-affirming mantra or intentional declaration. Its logic is metaphorical rather than literal, and the sequence (release, notice, return, protect) is consistent within its own conceptual framework.",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": [
    "The speaker experiences frequent emotional absorption or caretaking in relationships.",
    "The speaker values energetic or psychological boundary metaphors as practical tools.",
    "The statement is used as a cognitive or meditative anchor to reinforce a desired behavioral change.",
    "The speaker is psychologically ready and able to implement such boundaries in real interactions."
  ],
  "conditions_for_misleading": [
    "If taken literally as a description of supernatural energy transfer (e.g., 'handing back frequency' as a physical property).",
    "If it discourages genuine emotional support or empathy in healthy relationships.",
    "If the speaker uses it to avoid personal responsibility for their own emotional reactions.",
    "If it implies that others' emotions are inherently contaminating or toxic without justification."
  ]
}

parsed_json.communicative_function: The statement is a declaration of personal boundary-setting and self-protection. It communicates an intention to cease acting as an emotional caretaker for others and to maintain one's own energetic integrity.
implicit_claims: The speaker has been acting as an emotional surrogate (absorbing or stabilizing others' chaos).
It is possible to consciously 'release' a role or pattern of behavior.
Emotional states or 'frequency' can be physically or energetically handed back or returned.
One's personal field or energetic boundary can be kept whole and distinct from others' disturbances.
The speaker has the agency and ability to control this process.
parsed_json.coherence_assessment: The statement is internally coherent as a self-affirming mantra or intentional declaration. Its logic is metaphorical rather than literal, and the sequence (release, notice, return, protect) is consistent within its own conceptual framework.
conditions_for_usefulness: The speaker experiences frequent emotional absorption or caretaking in relationships.
The speaker values energetic or psychological boundary metaphors as practical tools.
The statement is used as a cognitive or meditative anchor to reinforce a desired behavioral change.
The speaker is psychologically ready and able to implement such boundaries in real interactions.
conditions_for_misleading: If taken literally as a description of supernatural energy transfer (e.g., 'handing back frequency' as a physical property).
If it discourages genuine emotional support or empathy in healthy relationships.
If the speaker uses it to avoid personal responsibility for their own emotional reactions.
If it implies that others' emotions are inherently contaminating or toxic without justification.
